result:
Build is green.

**Report:**

- **File modified**: `crates/lua-vm/src/api.rs`, added a new inherent method `LuaState::check_arg_integer` (inserted just before `check_number` at ~line 472).
- **What it does**: Faithful port of `luaL_checkinteger` from `lauxlib.c:445`. Calls `to_integer_x(self, arg)`; on `Some(d)` returns `Ok(d)`. On `None`, mirrors the C `interror` helper — if the value is number-shaped (`is_number`), raises `bad argument #N (number has no integer representation)`; otherwise raises `bad argument #N (number expected, got <type>)` via `LuaError::type_arg_error`.
- **No new `todo!()` calls inside**: implementation uses only existing free helpers (`to_integer_x`, `is_number`, `index_to_value`) — all already implemented.
- **Build status**: `cargo build -p lua-cli` is green (only pre-existing warnings remain).
